detaileddescription.para: PVD/PVM1/PVM2/PVM3/PVM4 through EXTI Line detection Interrupts
Tamper and TimeStamp interrupts through the EXTI line
RTC Wakeup interrupt through the EXTI line
TIM1 Break interrupt and TIM15 global interrupt
TIM1 Update Interrupt and TIM16 global interrupt
TIM1 Trigger and Commutation Interrupt and TIM17 global interrupt
RTC Alarm (A and B) through EXTI Line Interrupt
TIM6 global and DAC1&2 underrun error interrupts

briefdescription.para: STM32L4XX Interrupt Number Definition, according to the selected device in Library_configuration_section.

RTC Alarm (A and B) through EXTI Line Interrupt
TIM6 global and DAC1&2 underrun error interrupts

briefdescription.para: STM32L4XX Interrupt Number Definition, according to the selected device in Library_configuration_section.
